svg.text: Reference data · Operational · Event log (append-only) · Projections · Audit
audit trigger on every reference table

g.text: Key invariants (enforced by schema): (1) three-part PO unique key = (client_id, retailer_id, po_number); (2) ledger_events is append-only — UPDATE/DELETE blocked by trigger; corrections are compensating events;
(3) rule_sets are immutable snapshots — advance.rule_set_id frozen at creation makes fees prospective; current_rule_set() reads the active snapshot for retroactive borrowing base;
(4) payment_allocation_principal_bps + payment_allocation_fee_bps = 10000 (CHECK); (5) every money column is bigint cents, every business date is date anchored to America/New_York;
(6) RLS enabled on every table, scoped by current_user_client_ids(); (7) audit_log captures every reference-table change (not financial events — those are in ledger_events);

(8) optimistic locking via version column on every mutable reference row; (9) investors/creditors tables are Phase 2 stubs — schema present, no UI, nullable FKs on advances for future capital attribution.
